meaning: n.活力,气力,锐气,精力,精神vt.鼓起精神,激励  个人参股计划 PEP(Personal Equity Plan)
examples: A walk in the fresh air will pep you up.
Powell and Cheney spent the day giving pep talks to the troops.
Many say that, given a choice, they would opt for a holiday to put the pep back in their lives.
Here, a team of firemen clad in orange jumpsuits receive their last pep talk.
At a packed pep rally at a downtown restaurant, fans serenaded Johnson with chants of "Sac-ra-mento!"
